content.text:
Excellent! The refactoring is complete. Here's what was done:

## Summary

✅ **Created `src/errors.js`** — AppError class extending Error with:
- Constructor accepting `code` and `message` parameters
- `.name` set to `'AppError'`
- `.code` property storing the error code
- `.message` property storing human-readable text only

✅ **Updated 8 modules** — All throw sites converted from `throw new Error('CODE: text')` to `throw new AppError('CODE', 'text')`:
- validate.js (EMPTY_NAME)
- auth.js (BAD_TOKEN)
- parse.js (BAD_INT)
- money.js (NEG_AMOUNT)
- range.js (BAD_RANGE)
- store.js (MISSING_KEY)
- format.js (BAD_WIDTH)
- calc.js (DIV_ZERO)
- dates.js (BAD_DATE)

✅ **Updated `src/index.js`** — AppError re-exported from the barrel alongside existing exports

✅ **Verified** — No `new Error(` calls remain in src/ except within src/errors.js itself

All success-path behavior is unchanged; errors now follow a consistent convention with code and message separated.

result:
Excellent! The refactoring is complete. Here's what was done:

## Summary

✅ **Created `src/errors.js`** — AppError class extending Error with:
- Constructor accepting `code` and `message` parameters
- `.name` set to `'AppError'`
- `.code` property storing the error code
- `.message` property storing human-readable text only

✅ **Updated 8 modules** — All throw sites converted from `throw new Error('CODE: text')` to `throw new AppError('CODE', 'text')`:
- validate.js (EMPTY_NAME)
- auth.js (BAD_TOKEN)
- parse.js (BAD_INT)
- money.js (NEG_AMOUNT)
- range.js (BAD_RANGE)
- store.js (MISSING_KEY)
- format.js (BAD_WIDTH)
- calc.js (DIV_ZERO)
- dates.js (BAD_DATE)

✅ **Updated `src/index.js`** — AppError re-exported from the barrel alongside existing exports

✅ **Verified** — No `new Error(` calls remain in src/ except within src/errors.js itself

All success-path behavior is unchanged; errors now follow a consistent convention with code and message separated.
